design_philosophy.core_loop: Select character → engage in series of 1v1 fights with difficulty modulation → execute finishing moves (Fatalities/Animalities) → progress through arcade ladder toward final Shao Kahn battle
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Execution precision (combos, timing) vs. defensive play; balance between offensive rushdown and patient defense, with Run mechanic shifting meta toward aggression
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Master a martial arts fighter, learn signature moves and combos, dominate opponents with style through flashy finishing moves; defeat the invading Shao Kahn and his forces
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberately introduces Run button and dial-a-combos to reduce defensive advantage and accelerate match pace—a direct design response to player feedback. Rejects tournament narrative in favor of invasion storyline. Embraces extreme violence (Fatalities, Animalities) as core identity. Selectively removes legacy characters (notably Scorpion), forcing roster reinvention.

difficulty.continues_system: Continue system present; Ultimate Kombat Kodes accessible post-continue for unlock manipulation
difficulty.checkpointing: Per-fight progression through arcade ladder; no mid-fight checkpoints
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency: 'Choose Your Destiny' difficulty selection screen in single-player mode allows players to pre-select challenge level. Kombat Kodes enable difficulty/gameplay modifiers in two-player matches

progression.unlock_mechanism: Kombat Kodes (6-symbol in VS screen for two-player, 10-character Ultimate Kombat Kodes on game-over screen) unlock hidden characters, modify gameplay rules, and display messages. Smoke (robotic version) unlockable via Ultimate Kombat Kode
replayability_hooks: Multiple character roster with distinct movesets
Kombat Kodes system enabling infinite gameplay rule variations
Interactive stage transitions (uppercut through ceiling mechanics) alter level cycle unpredictably
Multiple finishing move types (Fatality, Babality, Friendship, Animality, Stage Fatality) encourage experimentation
Two-player versus mode with configurable parameters

world_building_techniques: Arcade mode ladder presents character-specific narrative (implied via opponent selection and final Shao Kahn confrontation)
Stage environments (Subway, Bell Tower, Pit 3, etc.) suggest world contexts
Character finishing moves (Animalities, Fatalities) reinforce personality/mythology
Plot setup: Shao Kahn invasion of Earthrealm with resurrected Sindel as catalyst

boss_design.philosophy: Final boss (Shao Kahn) serves as narrative climax and mechanical difficulty spike after linear progression. Boss design philosophy emphasizes pattern-based AI with limited adaptation, requiring player execution mastery and pattern memorization
notable_bosses: Shao Kahn (final boss, invasion force leader)

faction_indicators: Earthrealm defenders (implied player allegiance against invaders)
danger_signals: Shao Kahn invasion of Earthrealm (existential threat narrative)
environmental_storytelling: Interactive stage environments (Subway, Bell Tower, Pit variants) suggest contested locations
Level transitions via uppercuts create dynamic environmental pressure
Stage Fatalities (location-specific kills) reinforce environmental agency
